query: SELECT `storyId`, `eventType`, count(*), COALESCE(SUM(`orderValue`), 0) FROM `storyEvents` WHERE `storyEvents`.`storyId` IN (11, 12, 13, 14) GROUP BY `storyEvents`.`storyId`, `storyEvents`.`eventType`;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT `storyId`, `eventType`, count(*), COALESCE(SUM(`orderValue`), 0) FROM `storyEvents` WHERE `storyEvents`.`storyId` IN (11, 12, 13, 14) GROUP BY `storyEvents`.`storyId`, `storyEvents`.`eventType`;
